message:
refactor(runtime): eliminate per-dispatch payload clones via borrow-dispatch methods and fix env.get ordering for conformance compat

Extension dispatcher: introduce _ref dispatch variants (dispatch_exec_ref,
dispatch_session_ref, dispatch_events_ref) that accept &serde_json::Value
instead of owned values. Original methods now delegate to _ref variants,
eliminating unnecessary payload.clone() calls at every dispatch match arm.
Args/options parsing refactored to work with borrowed values throughout.

Extensions JS: reorder env.get binding so compat_env_fallback_value runs
before the deny_env check. This allows conformance scanning to inject
deterministic dummy keys even when the sandbox policy denies env access,
fixing a conformance test gap where denied extensions could not be scanned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
